creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
graphics/inkscape refuses to buil;d or being updated due to the below shown error message.

Both libpwg-0.1 and libpwg-0.2 ports are installed on the boxes in question and everything seems to be in the right place.

 CXX    extension/param/string.o
  CXX    extension/implementation/implementation.o
In file included from extension/param/enum.cpp:31:0:
extension/param/parameter.h:121:18: warning: 'virtual void Inkscape::Extension::Parameter::string(std::list<std::basic_string<char> >&)' was hidden [-Woverloaded-virtual]
extension/param/enum.h:43:10: warning:   by 'virtual void Inkscape::Extension::ParamComboBox::string(std::string&)' [-Woverloaded-virtual]
In file included from extension/param/radiobutton.cpp:36:0:
extension/param/parameter.h:121:18: warning: 'virtual void Inkscape::Extension::Parameter::string(std::list<std::basic_string<char> >&)' was hidden [-Woverloaded-virtual]
extension/param/radiobutton.h:47:10: warning:   by 'virtual void Inkscape::Extension::ParamRadioButton::string(std::string&)' [-Woverloaded-virtual]
  CXX    extension/implementation/script.o
  CXX    extension/implementation/xslt.o
In file included from extension/param/string.cpp:18:0:
extension/param/parameter.h:121:18: warning: 'virtual void Inkscape::Extension::Parameter::string(std::list<std::basic_string<char> >&)' was hidden [-Woverloaded-virtual]
extension/param/string.h:34:10: warning:   by 'virtual void Inkscape::Extension::ParamString::string(std::string&)' [-Woverloaded-virtual]
  CXX    extension/internal/wpg-input.o
extension/internal/wpg-input.cpp:58:44: fatal error: libwpg/WPGStreamImplementation.h: No such file or directory
compilation terminated.
gmake[2]: *** [extension/internal/wpg-input.o] Error 1
gmake[2]: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/graphics/inkscape/work/inkscape-0.48.2/src'
gmake[1]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/graphics/inkscape/work/inkscape-0.48.2'
gmake: *** [all] Error 2
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/inkscape.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/inkscape.

How-To-Repeat: Try install or update graphics/inkscape when both libpwg-0.1 and -0.2 are installed.
